partsUsed: Flowering tops (traditionally employed botanical drug part)
habitat: Damp meadows and ditches of Europe.
habitatDe: Damp Wiesen und ditches von Europa.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional anti-inflammatory tea; historical salicylate plant (aspirin story).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell anti-entzündlich Tee; historisch salicylate Pflanze (aspirin story).
preparation: Flower infusion; flowering herb tea as needed. Usual tea amounts.
preparationDe: Aufguss aus den Blüten; bei Bedarf auch blühendes Kraut. Übliche Teemengen.
historicalNotes: Linked to early aspirin research; fragrant marsh herb.
historicalNotesDe: Linked zu früh aspirin research; fragrant marsh Kraut.
